Package com.hmimesh.game

Class Enemy

java.lang.Object
com.hmimesh.game.Entity
com.hmimesh.game.Enemy
class Enemy extends Entity
Enemy class for battles.

    • dropChance

      public void dropChance(int Uhp, int Ulvl, Map<String,Integer> bag, Player player)
      a check to see if the player get an item drop
      Parameters:
      Uhp - User(aka player) health points
      Ulvl - User(aka Player) level
      bag - a map of bag with String and integer
      player - a player class
